_comment: Slugs that ats-discovery.saveDiscoveredTargets() will never auto-add and will actively prune from ats-targets.json. Use this when a target gets removed for cause (board doesn't exist, employee-only, etc.) but keeps getting re-discovered via SimplifyJobs or Handshake links. ats-targets.json stays the curation source of truth; this file is the curation negation.

denied.reason: OPENLANE_Careers / wd1 — board no longer exists (audited 2026-05-20)
Netflix Workday wd1 — Netflix doesn't use a public Workday board (audited 2026-05-20). The Lever-based 'netflix' entry is separate and legitimate.
